name: Galmudug (Somalia)

colors.symbolism: the hoist triangle and the central star
the two stars on the hoist triangle

description: A light blue field with a white triangle at the hoist bearing two green five-pointed stars, and a large white five-pointed star toward the fly.
history: Galmudug is a federal member state in central Somalia, established in 2006 and reorganised as a federal member state in 2015; its capital is Dhusamareb.

features.role: two green stars on the hoist triangle
